'use client'; import Link from 'next/link'; import { CheckCircle, Package, ArrowRight, Home } from 'lucide-react'; import { Button, Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui'; import { generateOrderId } from '@/lib/utils'; export default function CheckoutSuccessPage() { const orderId = generateOrderId(); return (

Order Confirmed!

Thank you for your purchase. Your order has been received and is being processed.

Order Number

{orderId}

Estimated Delivery

{new Date(Date.now() + 5 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', month: 'long', day: 'numeric', })}

Shipping Method

Standard Delivery

Status

Processing

What's Next?

You'll receive an email confirmation shortly. We'll notify you when your order ships.

); }
